subcodes.first_line: O ye close and dear friends of Abdu'l-Baha! In the Orient scatter perfumes, And shed splendours on the West. Carry light unto the Bulgar… Make haste to love!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جانی عبدالبهاء شرق معطر نما غرب منور نما نور ببلغار ده روح بسقلاب
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @prayer for peace and unity, @spiritual transformation, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
